title: Eat That Meat
description: Have you ever seen a wolf and thought to yourself, "Too bad I can't eat it"? With this mod, you can!
body:
Eat That Meat

by MCL

Eat That Meat is a mod that adds a type of meat for almost every type of animal in the game. Now you can eat foxes, parrots, wolves, cats, and even dolphins!

I will share the source code whenever time allows it

Currently includes English, Spanish, Polish, and (incomplete) Russian translations!

If you would like to translate this mod into another language please e-mail me at temp1@cubesoftware.xyz

Semi-official trailer

"Yes" to mod reposts!

Sharing is caring! This mod is free software distributed under the very permissive MIT/X Consortium; feel free to whatever you want with it as long as you include the license agreement in your derivative work!
